name: Onboarding pronouns Skip fires mutate with no onError/Sentry
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-10] mutate({pronouns:null}) after router.replace with no catch — can silently fail. Fix: add catch with Sentry capture.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: handleSkip navigates forward and then calls updatePronouns.mutate({ pronouns: null }) without an error callback or Sentry capture, so a failed best-effort clear after navigation is silent. Variants: single known path is the onboarding/settings pronouns Skip action; Continue already has explicit onError UI. Regression test: add/extend apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/onboarding/pronouns.test.tsx to make updatePronouns.mutate invoke onError on Skip and assert the failure is captured/logged without blocking navigation.
